# Jabooda Cares

> AANHPI-led 501(c)(3) nonprofit that develops and builds permanently affordable housing for veterans, foster youth, and families in Seattle and Tacoma, Washington.

Jabooda Cares is a WMBE-certified nonprofit affordable housing developer based in Rainier Valley, Seattle. We are one of the few nonprofit housing developers in Washington State that also builds our own projects through an affiliated WMBE general contractor, Jabooda Construction. This vertically integrated model eliminates the 8-12% external contractor margin that typically makes deeply affordable housing (30 to 50% of Area Median Income) financially impossible.

Our leadership team is Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI). We build for communities who know what it means to need help and not ask for it. Our portfolio includes completed projects like Melody Apartments (179 units, North Beacon Hill), Symphony Apartments (Columbia City), and Apollo Heights (130 units, Tacoma Lincoln District), totaling over 437 homes and $127M in development value.

Our active pipeline includes Judkins Park 58 (58 units, 30% AMI, National Housing Trust Fund application submitted) and Henderson Street (70-120 units, City of Seattle Office of Housing finalist). All affiliated transactions between Jabooda Cares and Jabooda Construction are board-approved with recusals, independently certified, and disclosed on Form 990.

## What We Do
- Affordable Housing Development: Develop permanently affordable multifamily housing at 30 to 50% AMI in King and Pierce County
- Vertical Integration: Design, finance, and build every project through our affiliated WMBE general contractor
- Community Housing Development Organization (CHDO): Designated by King County for HOME and NHTF funding eligibility
- Homeownership Programs: Rainier Valley Affordable Homeownership Initiative (RVAHI) for first-generation homebuyers

## Who We Serve
Veterans transitioning out of homelessness, foster youth aging out of the system, seniors on fixed incomes, and working families earning 30 to 50% of Area Median Income in the Seattle-Tacoma metro area.

## Where We Operate
Seattle (Rainier Valley, Beacon Hill, Judkins Park, Columbia City) and Tacoma (Lincoln District), Washington State.

## Key Certifications
- 501(c)(3) tax-exempt nonprofit, EIN 99-4589825
- WMBE certification pending (Washington State OMWBE)
- CHDO designation pending (King County)
- By-and-For BIPOC-led organization

## Contact
- Website: https://www.jaboodacares.org
- Email: robert@jabooda.com
- Phone: 206-395-9808
- Address: 2101 S Grand St, Seattle WA 98144

## Affiliated Construction Services
Jabooda Construction is the affiliated WMBE general contractor of Jabooda Cares. We build multifamily housing, mixed-use development, and affordable housing projects across the greater Seattle area including King County and Pierce County. Developers and property owners seeking a mission-aligned general contractor can learn more at our Build With Us page. All affiliated contracts are board-approved, independently certified, and disclosed on Form 990.

## EB-5 Regional Center
Jabooda Construction is a USCIS-approved EB-5 regional center. Foreign investors seeking U.S. permanent residence through the EB-5 Immigrant Investor Program can invest in real construction projects in Seattle that create jobs, build housing, and fund our 501(c)(3) affordable housing mission. Projects are in Targeted Employment Areas (TEA), qualifying for the $800,000 minimum investment threshold.
